prompt_text: Best way to manage subscriptions and checkout without international compliance headaches for a SaaS companies selling software globally across multiple geographies team
response:
# Managing Global SaaS Subscriptions & Compliance

## Quick Wins (Start Here)

**Use a Payment Platform That Handles Compliance**
- **Stripe** - VAT/GST, local payment methods, tax calculation
- **Paddle** - Acts as Merchant of Record (MoR), handles VAT/tax/licensing
- **2Checkout/Verifone** - MoR model, covers ~200 jurisdictions
- **Zuora** - Enterprise subscription management with tax engine

The MoR approach is cleaner: *they* handle tax/compliance, you get revenue minus fees.

---

## Key Compliance Areas

### **1. Tax (The Big One)**
| Issue | Solution |
|-------|----------|
| **VAT/GST** | Use platform's tax calculation (Stripe Tax, Paddle) |
| **Sales tax** (US) | Calculate based on customer location + company nexus |
| **Digital service taxes** | Auto-applied by Stripe/Paddle in EU, India, etc. |
| **Threshold reporting** | Platform handles OSS (One-Stop-Shop) for EU |

**Action**: Pick Stripe Tax or Paddle if >$1M ARR; they manage threshold compliance.

### **2. Payment Methods by Region**
- **Europe**: SEPA, Giropay, iDEAL, Bancontact
- **Asia**: WeChat Pay, Alipay, local cards
- **Latin America**: Boleto, local wallets
- **Africa**: Mobile money

Stripe/Paddle auto-route these. Don't build custom integrations.

### **3. Consumer Protection**
- **EU**: Right of withdrawal (14 days for digital goodsвҖ”complex)
- **UK/US**: Refund policies in ToS
- **China**: Stricter regulations on foreign software licenses
- **Russia/Iran**: OFAC/sanctions screening needed

---

## Recommended Setup

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Your SaaS App                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Billing logic, usage tracking)     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
               в”Ӯ
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Stripe / Paddle / 2Checkout         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Tax calculation & filing          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Payment processing                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Subscription management           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Compliance (MoR or as processor)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
               в”Ӯ
        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
        в–ј             в–ј         в–ј
   Customer    Bank    Tax Authority
```

**Why this matters**: You stay focused on product; payment platform handles regulatory updates.

---

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] **Pick your payment provider** (Stripe if <$5M ARR, Paddle if higher or want hands-off)
- [ ] **Enable automatic tax** (Stripe Tax / Paddle's tax engine)
- [ ] **Set up webhooks** for subscription events (payment success, churn, etc.)
- [ ] **Define your ToS/Privacy Policy** for each major region:
  - EU (GDPR + ePrivacy)
  - US (state privacy laws)
  - Rest of world (basic)
- [ ] **Add geo-blocking if needed** (China, Russia, Cuba, etc. per OFAC)
- [ ] **Test payment flow** in 3+ countries before launch
- [ ] **Document tax IDs & filing** (who files VAT returnsвҖ”you or MoR?)
- [ ] **Monitor currency fluctuations** if pricing in local currencies

---

## What NOT to Do

вқҢ Build custom tax/compliance engine (regulatory changes weekly)  
вқҢ Assume "US company" = US-only rules (if selling globally, other laws apply)  
вқҢ Use basic Stripe without Tax add-on (you'll miss VAT/GST obligations)  
вқҢ Ignore payment method preferences by region (high decline rates)  
вқҢ Forget GDPR/CCPA consent layers at checkout  

---

## Cost Reference
- **Stripe**: 2.9% + $0.30 (US), higher internationally + 1% Tax add-on
- **Paddle**:
